user.title: Connect Nodalia Wasabi Backups
user.description: Enter the customer installation details. The Wasabi endpoint is generated automatically from the selected region.

data_description.installation_name: Friendly name of the client or installation. It is converted into a clean slug for storage isolation.
data_description.bucket: Existing Wasabi bucket where the backups will be stored.
data_description.access_key_id: Access key with permission to access this installation prefix.
data_description.secret_access_key: Secret key for the access key above.
data_description.root_path: Optional folder before the installation slug. Backups are stored inside that folder and the generated installation slug.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Wasabi credentials
reauth_confirm.description: The stored credentials for installation {installation_name} in bucket {bucket} are no longer valid. Enter fresh credentials.

reconfigure.title: Edit Nodalia Wasabi Backups
reconfigure.description: Adjust the Wasabi connection details. The integration validates list, write and delete access before saving.

data_description.installation_name: Friendly name of the client or installation.
data_description.bucket: Existing Wasabi bucket where the backups will be stored.
data_description.access_key_id: Access key with permission to access this installation prefix.
data_description.secret_access_key: Secret key for the access key above.
data_description.root_path: Optional folder before the installation slug.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Wasabi from this Home Assistant instance.
error.bucket_not_found: The bucket does not exist or is not reachable with these credentials.
error.invalid_credentials: The credentials do not have the required access for this installation prefix.
error.invalid_installation_name: The installation name must contain letters or numbers.

abort.already_configured: An entry for this bucket and installation prefix already exists.

cannot_connect.message: Nodalia Wasabi Backups cannot reach Wasabi.

bucket_not_found.message: The bucket does not exist or is not reachable.

invalid_credentials.message: The credentials cannot access the configured installation prefix.

invalid_region.message: The configured Wasabi region is invalid.
